description: CLI output beautification: add --no-color flag, improve table formatting with proper alignment, add color accessibility (bold text alternatives), ensure --json output is valid parseable JSON for all commands, and verify emoji rendering safety
steps: In src/augur/cli.py, add a global --no-color option to the main Click group that sets an environment variable or context flag. When active, strip ANSI codes and use plain text markers instead of emojis.

Create a new module src/augur/cli_format.py that provides: (1) a color_text() helper respecting no-color mode, (2) a format_table() function for aligned columns with dynamic width, (3) a signal_icon() function that returns emoji or text based on mode, (4) a format_box() function for bordered output boxes.
Refactor the consensus_cmd output in src/augur/cli.py to use the new cli_format module: wrap signal/score/confidence in a bordered box, use consistent column alignment for the agent breakdown table.
Refactor analyze_cmd output (both single and all-agent modes) to use cli_format for consistent aligned columns.

Ensure the --json flag on analyze and consensus commands produces valid JSON including: proper timestamp field (ISO 8601), all numeric fields as numbers (not strings), and no trailing output after the JSON blob.
Add a --no-color test in tests/test_cli.py that verifies no ANSI escape sequences appear in output when the flag is set.
Add test cases verifying --json output is parseable by json.loads() for both analyze and consensus commands.
acceptance_criteria: Running `augur --no-color consensus AAPL --pe 25` produces output with no ANSI escape codes and no emojis
Running `augur consensus AAPL --pe 25 --json | python -m json.tool` succeeds (valid JSON)
Running `augur analyze AAPL --pe 25 --json | python -m json.tool` succeeds (valid JSON)
Agent breakdown table columns are properly aligned (signal, score, name all line up)
All existing CLI tests continue to pass
findings: All 216 tests pass including 6 new CLI tests. The --no-color flag sets NO_COLOR env var which cli_format helpers check. Emojis embedded in agent analysis results (findings, reasoning) are stripped via regex in clean_output(). format_table and format_box provide consistent aligned output.
